title: nostelis minor
intro: Nostelis minor, also known as Dwarf Nettle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Nettle family (Urticaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving allergies and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Nostelis minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
